/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X: DEFENDANT HAS A POSITIVE PROGRESS REPORT/VD: 04-20-22 FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/EMMOD: DEFENDANT IS ALLOWED OUTSIDE OFHOME DETENTION LOCATION TO ATTEND TRP PROGRAM ACTIVITIES WITH PRE-APPROVEDTIME SCHEDULE PROVIDED TO THE SF SHERIFF'S OFFICE/CONT/DOP/X: CASE REMAINS IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: DEFENDANT IS IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 03-23-22/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 04-20-22/TE: 1 HOUR/DOP/X: CASE REMAINS IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS/

/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/NP/X: APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT IS DEPUTY PUBLIC DEFENDER KATHLEEN GUNERATNE,/X: DEFENDANT REFUSES TO COME TO COURT,//CONTD: STATUS OF RELEASE/DOPU: DEFENDANT IN PROGRAM,/X: CASE IS IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS,/

/CAL: PLACEMENT STATUS AND RECEIPT OF ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/INTC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, ANDIS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD: DEFENDANT MUST REMAINCONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMESIS OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE, APPROVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES- TRP ACADEMY/CTORD: DEFENDANT MUST ENTER IN AND COMPLETE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AT TRP ACADEMY/CTORD: DEFENDANT MUST REPORT TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION 5X WEEK FOR SUPERVISION/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOPU: DEFENDANT IN RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM/X: CASE IS IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/
/CAL: ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/INTC/X: ACM IS REQUESTING A CONTINUANCE FOR1 MORE WEEK/CONTD: PLACEMENT STATUS & ACM ELIGILITY REPORT/DOP/X: LOVE WAIVER/

/CAL:TO SET:SAW 12-05-21/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT WAS ALREADY DISCHARGED ON 10-07-21 BY JUDGE GIORGI/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDEREDAND  STAYED TO 12-17-21/X: BAIL SET AT $10,000/CONTD:PROC RE BW STAY 12-17-21 $10K FTA PHC/DOP/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/INTC/BWDNC/X: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT DISCHARGED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ONPRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH AGPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE ANELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/WS/X: DEFENDANT SHALL CHECK IN 1X PER WEEK AND PARTICIPATE IN YOUNG COMMUNITY DEVELOPERS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR ON 11-05-21,THEREFORE THE COURT FOUND GOOD CAUSE TO VACATE THE 10TH DAY OF 11-08-21/X:THE DEFENDANT ALSO DID NOT APPEAR TODAY 11-08-21 THE 60TH DAY OF 12-27-21 HAS BEENVACATED AND A LOVE WAIVER IS DECLARED/X:LOVE WAIVER STATUS/12    XPROC REBW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT;A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO11-15-21/X: BAIL SET AT $10,000/
